title: Disk Precision
description: diskprecision.com zoominfo.com/c/disk-precision-group/11452653 Disk Precision Group (DP Group) is a Singapore-headquartered precision engineering company founded in 1986, specializing in CNC Turning and Milling of high-precision metal components. With manufacturing sites across Southeast Asia (Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand), they serve global OEM clients in Oil & Gas, Automotive, Consumer Electronics, and Aerospace sectors
